templateOwned.description: Files 100% owned by the template — safe to overwrite on update. Each entry maps template-repo source path to installed-target path.

templateDerived.description: Template files whose changes should propagate to generated files in target projects. Only updates files that already exist in the target (i.e., agents the project chose to install). Placeholder variables are substituted using .devforge/project-config.json.

mappings.description: Generated by scripts/generate-agents.py from src/agents/*.md. Claude-native YAML+markdown files. Three-way merge preserves project customizations.
Sourced from src/CLAUDE.md. Three-way merge against .devforge/template/CLAUDE.md preserves project customizations.

mergeFiles.description: Files with both template and project content — smart merge required

.mcp.json.description: Union of mcpServers keys — add new template servers, keep existing project servers

.gitignore.description: Add new template lines, keep existing project lines

templateRepoOnly.description: Files that exist only in the template repo — NOT copied to target projects during install or update

copyIfMissing.description: Files to copy only if they don't exist in the target project
